publishedAbstract: - I'm running a RHOCP cluster with a cluster-wide proxy enabled- When there is an issue with NOPROXY information this could cause NooBaa to enter a `Creating`, `Connecting`, and eventually a `Rejected` state with logs like: ~~~ INFO[0000] ⏳ BackingStore " " Phase is "Creating": TemporaryError CheckExternalConnection Status=TIMEOUT Error=OperationTimeout Message=Operation timeout ERRO[0000] ❌ BackingStore " " Phase is "Rejected": Backing store mode: IO_ERRORS BackingStorePhaseRejected ~~~
publishedTitle: NooBaa In Proxy Environment: Backingstore Phase is "Creating" or "Rejected": TemporaryError CheckExternalConnection Status=TIMEOUT Error=OperationTimeout - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
